title: Easy Light Portuguese San Marzano Tomato Wrap
description: A kid-friendly, Jain-friendly Portuguese dish made with San Marzano tomatoes, clay pot cooked and wrapped in a ti-leaf wrap. This tangy, light wrap is perfect for a quick snack or light meal.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a clay pot over medium heat.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the chopped onion and cook for 2 minutes, until translucent.
Add the canned San Marzano tomatoes, oregano, salt, and pepper. Cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Warm the ti-leaf wraps in the clay pot for 1 minute, until pliable.
Spoon the tomato mixture onto the center of a ti-leaf wrap.
Drizzle with lemon juice and fold the wrap to enclose the filling.
Serve immediately, garnished with additional oregano if desired.
